items.summary: While Aventon isn’t currently having any kind of major sale running right now, the brand is offering ongoing all-time low prices on two of its e-bikes. My pick of the two is the Level 3 Smart Commuter e-bike down at $1,699 shipped with either a step-over or step-through frame. Down from $1,899, we first saw this price during Black Friday, and in 2026 it didn’t return until April. Since then, we’ve been regularly seeing it return in sales, most recently during the long-lasting July 4th promotions. That sale may be over, but the $200 markdown is remaining, giving you a prolonged shot at the all-time lowest price we have tracked for this smart e-bike. Likewise, the Pace 4 Step-Through Smart Cruiser e-bike is also down at its low of $1,599 shipped.
